OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Jason Jungreis; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Park Merced Investors is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Aaron Arjano and Gabriel Herrera are present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of FEB 9, 2015 is vacated. (501/JPT)
